name: lyrics_generation
description: Suede Labs lyrics generation service for songwriters, topliners, producers, content creators, advertising creatives, game writers, and agents building songwriting-aware AI music pipelines. Generates structured, performable song lyrics from a prompt describing topic, mood, style, or reference artists, with proper sectional structure (verse, pre-chorus, chorus, bridge, outro), consistent rhyme schemes, and singable meter. Distinct from generic text generation: tuned for prosody, internal rhyme, line-length discipline, and section conventions that make lyrics actually fit a song. Supports demo and pitch lyric drafting, songwriting unblock and ideation, ad jingle copy, game and animation song writing, multilingual lyric drafting, and paid x402/ACP agent commerce workflows. Input is a prompt plus optional language and structure; output is structured lyric text with labeled sections.

prompt.description: Free-text description of the song's topic, mood, perspective, reference style, or storyline. Example: 'A late-night drive through a rainy city, missing someone, indie-pop in the style of warm 2010s alternative.'

language.description: Optional BCP-47 language tag for the generated lyrics (e.g. 'en', 'es', 'ja', 'pt-BR'). Defaults to English.

structure.description: Optional section structure as a dash-separated list. Defaults to 'verse-chorus-verse-chorus-bridge-chorus'.

rhyme_scheme.description: Preferred rhyme scheme per section. auto lets the Suede pipeline pick what fits the prompt.

explicit_allowed.description: Whether explicit language is permitted in the generated lyrics.

examples.prompt: A late-night drive through a rainy city, missing someone, indie-pop in the style of warm 2010s alternative.
